member_long_descriptions: Close-up view of a beige-and-cream striped bedspread draped over a dark wooden footboard, showing woven fabric texture and wrinkles; partial/edge-cropped view of the bed, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Close-up of a partial bed showing a striped gray-beige fabric bedspread and a matching pillow at the left, with a dark wooden headboard partially visible; the mattress and bedding are cropped by the image edges and appear about 0.6 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up view of a beige-and-cream striped bedspread draped over a dark wooden footboard, showing woven fabric texture and wrinkles; partial/edge-cropped view of the bed, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Large reflective black flat-screen TV with a thin bezel; the dark glass surface fills most of the crop and clearly reflects the room (ceiling fan, two bedside lamps and a dresser), showing mild glare and faint smudges — estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Large reflective black flat-screen TV with a thin bezel; the dark glass surface fills most of the crop and clearly reflects the room (ceiling fan, two bedside lamps and a dresser), showing mild glare and faint smudges — estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.

member_descriptions: navy fabric storage basket, beige handle
member_long_descriptions: Gray-brown woven rectangular storage basket with a folded light-gray fabric liner visible at the top; textured wicker-like weave with slight wear, front face largely visible but top edge is partially cropped — appears to be about 0.8 meters from the camera.

Soft-sided navy-blue fabric storage basket with a subtle diamond/check texture and a sewn beige loop handle on the front; rectangular cuboid, open-top bin that is slightly occluded at the bottom by a white shelf edge and appears about 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Gray-brown woven rectangular storage basket with a folded light-gray fabric liner visible at the top; textured wicker-like weave with slight wear, front face largely visible but top edge is partially cropped — appears to be about 0.8 meters from the camera.

member_descriptions: brown wooden-blade ceiling fan edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Close-up of a ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted glass light globe; the unit is partially cut off by the crop (blade edges and housing visible) and shot from a low angled perspective, with slight motion blur on the blades, approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up of a ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted glass light globe; the unit is partially cut off by the crop (blade edges and housing visible) and shot from a low angled perspective, with slight motion blur on the blades, approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Front-facing dark brown wooden nightstand with three visible drawers and round brass knobs, worn/scuffed finish and visible wood grain, low rectangular profile on short legs; horizontally edge-cropped in the image; approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
clusters.representative_description: Front-facing dark brown wooden nightstand with three visible drawers and round brass knobs, worn/scuffed finish and visible wood grain, low rectangular profile on short legs; horizontally edge-cropped in the image; approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.

member_long_descriptions: Low, long dark-stained wooden dresser with a glossy finish, recessed-panel drawer fronts and multiple round knobs; floor-standing piece occupying the foreground, partially cropped at the left and right edges, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Low, long dark-stained wooden dresser with a glossy finish, recessed-panel drawer fronts and multiple round knobs; floor-standing piece occupying the foreground, partially cropped at the left and right edges, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Close-up (~0.5 m) of an off-white rectangular bed pillow with wrinkled, linen-like fabric, visible seam/piping and horizontal crease lines; pillow is partially cropped at the image edge and shows light shadowing along folds.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up (~0.5 m) of an off-white rectangular bed pillow with wrinkled, linen-like fabric, visible seam/piping and horizontal crease lines; pillow is partially cropped at the image edge and shows light shadowing along folds.

member_long_descriptions: Cream/ivory glass bowl-shaped pendant lamp with a glossy surface and a brown/bronze metal cap; the fixture appears close-up, rotated and partially cropped at the image edge (approx. 0.6 m from camera).
clusters.representative_description: Cream/ivory glass bowl-shaped pendant lamp with a glossy surface and a brown/bronze metal cap; the fixture appears close-up, rotated and partially cropped at the image edge (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

member_long_descriptions: Partial foreground view of a bed with a light-gray and beige striped bedspread and a matching pillow near the head; the wooden headboard is partially visible at the left and the left side of the mattress is occluded by a lamp — bed surface appears made and flat; estimated distance about 0.8 m from camera.
